productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Benecio Leather Drip White Casual Shoes
description: There&rsquo s no keeping a low profile with these low-profile Benecio Leather Drip shoes from puma. The simple design and durable construction goes well with everything. These shoes come with a leather upper for instant style and durability, cushioned midsole for comfort and stability and rubber outsole for maximum traction - perfect for urban life! Upper Crinkled-leather upper for durability, style and comfort Padded collar and tongue for enhanced comfort and snug Fit Leather formstripe detail on the sides High ankle support for comfort to the lower leg Brand name embossed on the heel guard and ankle for style Midsole Breathable fabric lining and a cushioned footbed for all-day comfort. TPU and EVA midsole combined to give you support and ample cushioning Outsole Textured durable rubber outsole for maximum traction and grip
